# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent supply chain security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "company/secure-application",
    "description": "Secure application with automated setup",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "proprietary",
    "require": {
        "php": ">=8.1",
        "ext-json": "*",
        "ext-openssl": "*"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "composer/composer": "^2.0"
    },
    "config": {
        "secure-http": true,
        "disable-tls": false,
        "allow-plugins": {
            "composer/installers": true
        },
        "platform-check": true
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"if (!extension_loaded('openssl')) { echo 'OpenSSL extension required'; exit(1); }\"",
            "@validate-environment",
            "@setup-directories",
            "@download-verified-assets",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@run-setup-script",
            "@verify-installation"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@validate-environment",
            "@download-verified-assets",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@clear-cache",
            "@verify-installation"
        ],
        "validate-environment": [
            "@php scripts/ValidateEnvironment.php"
        ],
        "setup-directories": [
            "@php -r \"$dirs = ['storage/logs', 'storage/cache', 'storage/uploads', 'public/assets']; foreach ($dirs as $dir) { if (!is_dir($dir)) { mkdir($dir, 0750, true); } chmod($dir, 0750); }\"",
            "@php -r \"if (file_exists('storage')) { chown('storage', posix_getuid()); }\""
        ],
        "download-verified-assets": [
            "@php scripts/DownloadAssets.php"
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "@php scripts/CompileAssets.php"
        ],
        "run-setup-script": [
            "@php scripts/Setup.php"
        ],
        "clear-cache": [
            "@php scripts/ClearCache.php"
        ],
        "verify-installation": [
            "@php scripts/VerifyInstallation.php"
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "validate-environment": "Validates PHP version, extensions, and environment configuration",
        "setup-directories": "Creates required directories with secure permissions",
        "download-verified-assets": "Downloads and verifies assets from trusted sources",
        "compile-assets": "Compiles and optimizes application assets",
        "run-setup-script": "Executes initial application setup",
        "clear-cache": "Clears application cache",
        "verify-installation": "Verifies installation integrity"
    },
    "extra": {
        "asset-sources": {
            "trusted-domains": [
                "cdn.example.com",
                "assets.example.com"
            ],
            "checksum-algorithm": "sha256"
        },
        "security": {
            "require-https": true,
            "verify-checksums": true,
            "max-file-size": 10485760
        }
    }
}
